title: Option to add custom holidays to impact timeline
excerpt:

posts.author: saoirsemcgarry (Saoirse McGarry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I frequently use the ‘Timeline’ column in my boards, which includes a countdown number of days remaining when you hover over it. I want to update this countdown to reflect reality - which means ignoring our public holidays here in Ireland / our company holidays. I think you should have a custom ‘Holidays’ feature in settings that you can include specific holidays into that are then discounted throughout your boards/tables etc.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to integrate holidays into Monday.com timelines / countdown feature

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team. We just launched a new app- SuperPlanner. I believe it answers your needs.

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
